history.directive: Focus priorities: (1) continuously test and improve the site (functionality, features, look & feel), (2) continuously find new worker leads, (3) prioritize top-notch SEO across the site.
Stop the MVP admin dashboard work. Founder does not want it built.
Add a roadmap item for a leads page where leads can be viewed by category (and related filters).
Bump Leads Directory Page priority to top and implement immediately.

Professional pages are shipping broken image URLs (Unsplash 404s), e.g. /professionals/giannis-kosta-klimatismos and /professionals/maria-georgiou-ydravlikos. Replace dead image sources immediately and add image URL validation in build so no profile card can publish with a broken hero/avatar.

Professional profile UX is unacceptable: pages show failure-state copy to users (e.g. 'Αξιοπιστία: προσωρινά χαμηλή λόγω αποτυχίας φόρτωσης', 'Σφάλμα φόρτωσης κριτικών'). Hide internal failure diagnostics from public UI, implement graceful fallback for reviews, and show a clean empty-state instead of panic messaging.

Homepage and key landing pages are missing social preview essentials (no og:image, no twitter:card). Add complete Open Graph + Twitter metadata with a real branded image so links don’t look broken/cheap when shared.

The 404 experience is broken for SEO and trust: typo URLs like /profissionals return a page without title/description. Ship a proper custom 404 with meaningful <title>, meta description, clear navigation back to categories/home, and index control.

City service pages are near-clones (e.g. /episkevi-klimatistikou-athina vs /episkevi-klimatistikou-thessaloniki are ~96% identical text). Rewrite with real local differentiation (neighborhood coverage, local pricing realities, local proof/reviews) or you’re creating doorway-style thin pages that look programmatic and low-trust.
